Domain Guider

Computer Science

Help students to choose their perfect domain

Every path in computer science, before you pick one


There are many paths in computer science, and it can be overwhelming to choose one. Here are some tips to help you make an informed decision


Most people choose a domain by vibes, or whatever a friend is learning. Click into any card below to see exactly which fields sit inside it.



Computer Science Domains

Cyber Security

defending digital systems, networks, devices, and sensitive data from malicious attacks, unauthorized access, and theft

Web Development

process of building, maintaining, and managing websites and web applications.

Mobile App development

process of creating software for smartphones and tablets.

AI & Machine Learning

Teach machines to notice patterns humans would miss.

Data Science & Analytics

Turn raw numbers into decisions worth making

Cloud Computing

Rent someone else's data center and scale on demand

DevOps & Site Reliability

Ship code fast without waking anyone up at 3am.

Blockchain & Web3

Build systems nobody can quietly rewrite later

Database Systems

Wherever the data lives, someone had to design that

Game Development

Build worlds people choose to spend hours inside

Networking & Systems

The plumbing everything else quietly depends on

Embedded Systems & IoT

Software that has to survive inside real hardware

UI/UX & Product Design

Decide what people see before a line of code runs

Software Engineering & Systems Programming

Write the software other software is built on top of

AR/VR & Spatial Computing

Build experiences that live in physical space, not just a screen

Quality Assurance & Testing

Find what's broken before your users do

Computer Science Theory & Research

The ideas that eventually become tomorrow's tools

IT Support & Technical Operations

Keep the technology everyone else relies on actually working

Back to all domains

Helping students explore every path in computer science, before they pick one.
